addition.item: Added Joomla-compatible changelog.xml for backend release tracking.
Added manifest changelogurl support for changelog display in Joomla.
Added CHANGELOG.md for repository and release notes.

change.item: Added an explicit manifest element value of cookienotice for clearer update identity.
Prepared the release metadata on top of the JED-clean 1.0.18 codebase without frontend behavior changes.

note.item: This release focuses on update and changelog metadata, not frontend behavior.

fix.item: Fixed accidental literal backslash-n text appearing in the cookie notice markup.
Cleaned generated HTML output for stable frontend rendering.

change.item: Reduced CSS dependence on Bootstrap utility classes.
Hardened button and link styling inside plugin CSS.

addition.item: Added joomla.asset.json and Web Asset Manager registration.

change.item: Refactored the plugin to Joomla 6-style SubscriberInterface event handlers.
Restricted execution to site HTML documents only.
Improved standalone CSS compatibility for templates without Bootstrap utilities.

fix.item: Added secure cookie handling on HTTPS requests.
Improved translated default title and close-label handling.
